# B2C Solution Seller

> B2C Solution is a technology and digital services company offering websites, AI tools, automation, and custom digital products for small businesses — starting at ₹3500 for an AI website.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, pricing, projects, and how to get started.
- [Services](/services): Full catalog of digital services and pricing.
- [Reviews](/reviews): Customer reviews and testimonials.
- [Team](/team): Team members and collaborators.
- [Contact](/contact): WhatsApp, email, and inquiry form.
- [Join the Community](/community): Telegram and WhatsApp community links.
